title: Galatria
description:
GALATRIA

Strap into the cockpit and take the fight across the stars. GALATRIA is a 3D arcade

shoot-'em-up that fuses the relentless wave assault of the best know 80's and 90's Games, the multi-directional mayhem and the fast, replayable package.

Features:

Scrolling 3D battlefields — pilot a fully 3D fighter over hand-crafted stages.

Island labyrinths — after every boss, a floating island maze drifts in from deep space. Thread the corridors at speed; the glowing walls mean instant death.

Dug-in gun emplacements — tanks, towers and spider-turrets track your every move and open fire; the tanks answer with homing rockets.

Boss battles — massive capital ships that don't just vanish when beaten: watch them break apart, burn and drift away.

Arcade feel, modern polish— tight controls, a driving original soundtrack, punchy explosions, and a shield to save you in a pinch.

Controls:

Arrow keys to fly, A to fire, S for your shield — fully rebindable. 
Joysticks, Joypads, X-Box Controller

How far into the swarm can you get?

Extras: 
- Coop Play together (2 Player Mode) 
- Coop Play against each other side by side in a Split Screen (party VS Mode) (only on 16:9 Resolutions) 
- Full Arcade Cabinet Support: (Aspects 3:4 and 9:16)
description_short: A fast, retro 3D arcade shoot-'em-up. Pilot your fighter across scrolling battlefields, thread floating island labyrinths where one wrong move is fatal, and blast through relentless waves and screen-filling bosses. Inspired by the 80's and 90's Arcade Games of the Times.
